channel.title: Posts on systools.it
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on systools.it

item.title: AD CS AutoEnrollment and CryptoAPI: a real-world case of enrollment blocked by cryptographic middleware
item.description: A domain-joined Windows 11 client was failing to renew its machine certificate for EAP-TLS. The CA was working. The template was correct. The block was local, silent, and caused by a cryptographic middleware intercepting CryptoAPI before certreq could complete the request.

item.title: VMUG IT Community Day – Verona, 27 maggio
item.description: My thoughts on this year's VMUGIT

item.title: Hello World
item.description: I never felt the need to talk about myself. Until the day I did.

item.title: Welcome to systools.it
item.description: Who I am, why this blog and what I'll write about — from an Enterprise Architect's perspective.
